title: impatiens eryaleia subsp. mbeyaensis
intro: Impatiens eryaleia subsp. mbeyaensis, also known as the Mbeya balsam, is a species of flowering plant in the balsam family that is native to Tanzania. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of the Mbeya balsam include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments to be used for medicinal purposes.
